dm_location: Volume 6, Chapter 1 — Development Management Standards & Guidelines
sightline_y: 215 m min visibility distance where road speed limit 80 km/h or greater
wastewater_standard: EPA Code of Practice: Domestic Waste Water Treatment Systems (2021)
site_coverage_pct: 85% urban (or up to existing on brownfield); 65% rural (one-off housing)
separation_distance_m: 22 m between directly opposing above-ground-floor windows
private_open_space: 50 sqm (1-2 bed); 60 sqm (3 bed); 75 sqm (4+ bed)
public_open_space_pct: 15% of total site area (residential); 20% + 15 sqm per resident for certain care facilities
car_parking_dwelling: Housing estate per dwelling: 0/1/2 (Area 1/2/3); Apartment: 0/0/2; 1 bike space each
building_height: per Urban Development and Building Heights Guidelines (2018)
trigger_AA: AA Screening Report + Natura Impact Statement where applicable
trigger_FRA: Flood Risk Assessment (case-by-case with Planning Authority)
trigger_AHIA: Architectural Heritage Assessment report by conservation architect where deemed necessary
trigger_EcIA: Ecological Impact Assessment (case-by-case; incl. bat surveys)
notes: Density design-led, no dph figure. Rural site area performance-based (driven by WWTS capacity + EPA separation), no fixed min. Entrance gates recessed 4.5 m behind hedgerow, side boundaries splayed 45 degrees. Apartment min floor areas in Table 2. AA bird survey 2 yrs prior for relevant developments. Justification Test/percolation not named verbatim.
